final:
// // This module calculates the parity of a three-bit input signal. The output will be LOW (0) if the number of HIGH (1) bits in the input is odd, and HIGH (1) if the number of HIGH bits is even.
module top_module(input [2:0] in, output out);assign out = (in[0] ^ in[1] ^ in[2]);endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module calculates the parity of a three-bit input signal. The output will be LOW (0) if the number of HIGH (1) bits in the input is odd, and HIGH (1) if the number of HIGH bits is even.
